emails.subject: Read this
emails.body: Read this Kay, wherever you are, ENE is trading at 4.86 at this moment. Uggggggg

emails.subject: Re: Read this
emails.body: Re: Read this How much volume? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Read this
emails.body: RE: Read this Dang, you sent this message late. Hope you had a good Thanksgiving. We had a great time. My niece came over (she is 5 and is my shadow) and we ate and drank plenty. Have ya'll fished any? I'll bet Michael is having a blast! See you Monday (I can't remember the volume of the trading). K-

emails.subject: RE: Read this
emails.body: RE: Read this I don't think the stock price is the key piece of the puzzle, as it doesn't impact value of the biz. It is all about keeping the banks at bay and DYN interested. Stay tuned for "restructuring plan" (aka layoffs) next week. Fingers crossed? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
